hooks.prompt:
Validate this git commit command follows Conventional Commits format:

$ARGUMENTS

Conventional Commits format: type(scope)?: subject\n\nbody (optional)

Valid types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, chore, ci, build

Examples:
- feat(auth): add login validation
- fix: resolve race condition in drill timer
- docs: update README with design system

If the commit message is valid format, respond with:
{"decision": "allow", "reason": "Valid Conventional Commit"}

If invalid, respond with:
{"decision": "block", "reason": "Invalid format. Expected: type(scope)?: subject"}

ONLY respond with JSON, no other text.
